location.name: Calheta Beach
location.summary: A sheltered sandy beach with calmer water, cafés and a marina nearby.
location.imageAlt: Calheta Beach on Madeira south-west coast

article.intro: Calheta Beach is a sheltered south-west coast beach with sand, a marina and nearby cafés.
article.history: The beach was created as part of Calheta’s coastal leisure area and is distinct from Madeira’s many pebble and black-sand beaches.
highlights: Marina, cafés and south-west coast sunshine
article.practicalTip: It is often calmer than open-ocean beaches, but check local sea conditions before swimming.
